ticket_goal: Implement multi-user support to enable collaboration

discovery-agent.socratic_reasoning: STRATEGIC MISALIGNMENT: While technically feasible, multi-user collaboration is a 'Phase 3: Commercial Expansion' feature according to docs/MONETIZATION_STRATEGY.md. The project's current focus is Phase 1 (Community Adoption) and Phase 2 (Feature Maturation). Implementing a fundamental data model shift (User -> Workspace) now would be premature optimization and would delay core features like AI highlighting and BYOS.
